headline: Visa (V) Launches Validator Node on Tempo Network
summary: Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) is one of the 10 Unrivaled Stocks of the Next 5 Years. On April 14, Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) announced the launch of its validator node on the Tempo network. This marks an important step in the company’s efforts to grow its blockchain capabilities and its role in stablecoin payments. The move highlights […]

headline: Berkshire May Have Sold $15 Billion of Stocks Run by Former Manager
summary: CEO Greg Abel decided to unload the stocks that had been managed by Todd Combs, who left in December for JPMorgan Chase.

raw.headline: Berkshire May Have Sold $15 Billion of Stocks Run by Former Manager
raw.summary: CEO Greg Abel decided to unload the stocks that had been managed by Todd Combs, who left in December for JPMorgan Chase.

headline: How The Investment Story For Capital One (COF) Is Shifting On Analyst Cuts And Brex Deal
summary: Capital One Financial is back in focus after a fair value estimate was revised from US$269.67 to US$257.90, a cut of about US$11.76 per share. That shift lines up with a wave of analyst commentary, where many firms are trimming price targets to factor in tougher conditions for consumer finance stocks, even as others highlight company specific positives and the Brex partnership. As you read on, you will see how these adjustments fit into the broader analyst narrative and what signals to watch...

headline: Zoom Partners With Sam Altman's World To Tackle AI Imposters In Meetings
summary: Zoom partners with World to introduce human identity verification in meetings, addressing rising concerns over AI deepfakes and digital fraud.
